title: lasthenia glabrata subsp. glabrata
intro: Lasthenia glabrata subsp. glabrata, also known as the California goldfields, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lasthenia glabrata subsp. glabrata are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
